tasks.label: CMake: Configure
tasks.command: call "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/VC/Auxiliary/Build/vcvars64.bat" && "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/Common7/IDE/CommonExtensions/Microsoft/CMake/CMake/bin/cmake.exe" -S . -B build -G Ninja -DCMAKE_BUILD_TYPE=Debug -DCMAKE_VS_PLATFORM_NAME=x64 -DCMAKE_C_COMPILER="%VCToolsInstallDir%\bin\Hostx64\x64\cl.exe" -DCMAKE_CXX_COMPILER="%VCToolsInstallDir%\bin\Hostx64\x64\cl.exe" -DCMAKE_LINKER="%VCToolsInstallDir%\bin\Hostx64\x64\link.exe" -DCMAKE_AR="%VCToolsInstallDir%\bin\Hostx64\x64\lib.exe"

tasks.label: CMake: Build gym_studio
tasks.command: call "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/VC/Auxiliary/Build/vcvars64.bat" && "C:/Program Files/Microsoft Visual Studio/2022/Community/Common7/IDE/CommonExtensions/Microsoft/CMake/CMake/bin/cmake.exe" --build build --config Debug --target gym_studio
